claims.summary: Verify phase-transition cards preserve solo or joint type, phenomenology, telemetry anchors, vectors, duration, and felt friction.
Verify telemetry evidence cannot itself trigger pressure, fill, PI, weighting, or controller authority.
Implement a replyable relational transition card for reflective solitude becoming inbox-forced direct Dialogue without auto-triggering MomentCapture.
Any phase-transition behavior unlock that changes pressure, porosity, weighting, or mode control remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
